learnings: Task decomposition with clear dependencies makes execution predictable
6 tasks for login API is appropriate granularity
Minimal scaffold avoids wasted work - only build what's needed for next task
Basic smoke tests validate scaffold without over-testing infrastructure
Scaffold-level review is fast: no logic means fewer issues
Core cycle (plan→code→test→review→reflect→plan) works well for incremental development
No kernel evolution needed for standard feature development
